Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Attorney Sheena Patel, Esq. of Law Offices of Andrew Wolff, PC (510-834-3300), counsel for plaintiff/moving party
Attorney Gerald Lau, Esq. (650-579-6608), counsel for co-defendants/opposing parties Chae Lin and Ling Lin

Court preliminarily states findings of procedural problems and no basis to grant. Court hears arguments from both sides. Court rules now as follows:

PLAINTIFF MOUSTAFA ABOUGABEL's Motion To Tax Costs is DENIED. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312.
